name: Watchtower
subtitle: An experience like no other.
description:
This is the official source for Watchtower.

For full details, check the GitHub repository:
https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower

apps.name: Watchtower
apps.subtitle: Read manga, novels, and watch anime
apps.localizedDescription: Watchtower is an open-source Flutter app for reading manga, novels, and watching anime across multiple platforms.

versions.localizedDescription:
What's Changed
* feat: add showNSFW setting and integrate into browsing features
* added required api key via a cloudflare proxy by @Schnitzel5 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/678
* fix(reader): restore chapter read•state updates in continuous mode by @MorningOctober in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/677
* integrated ApkBridge for desktop by @Schnitzel5 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/684
* Fix Exception when restoring from a backup on Linux by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/683
* Revert commits by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/686
* added mass migration by @Schnitzel5 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/687
* Add ability to change the compression level of the backup file by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/685
* Add suggested changes of review from last PR by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/688
* Move Flutter initialization and error handlers into runZonedGuarded and add Linux exit workaround by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/689
* fixed restore backup by @Schnitzel5 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/690
* fixed server update on Windows by @Schnitzel5 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/691

New Contributors
* @MorningOctober made their first contribution in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/677

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/compare/v0.7.3...v0.7.4

What's Changed
* Fix shouldUpdate button in categories view by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/657
* Improve extension service lifecycle, isolate robustness, dedupe lists, and UI/lifecycle cleanups by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/644
* Improve failure message by using itemType.name by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/661
* Change 'Игрок' to 'Плеер' in Russian localization by @userkilled in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/662
* Improve Kitsu login dialog with autofill, input validation by @NBA2K1 in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/664
* [removing history entry removes manga from library 663](https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/issues/663)
* [Refactor](https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/commit/1256e608c7599f12be9b4f1ad03d7aa71eed599f)
* [feat: Implement app lock feature with biometric authentication](https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/commit/f7293802234ee00a78f1132b9ec1463f93b016c3)
* [feat(reader): add navigation layout options and settings for screen behavior](https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/commit/2f0fc853161c74552bc14f187fb39f683f9eb906)
* [feat(reader): implement bidirectional chapter preloading and enhance memory management](https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/commit/87028ea8f599204ac3a81d39a3e2784b72b52d9b)
* [feat: Implement upcoming manga calendar feature](https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/commit/95a55d5f81c5e42075048ec53540b06f1952c496)

New Contributors
* @userkilled made their first contribution in https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/pull/662

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ferelking242/watchtower/compare/v0.7.1...v0.7.2

* fix 643 EPUB fails to load when nav.xhtml references missing script (../js/kobo.js)

* Fix 637: Importing .epub doesn’t work
* Enhance category management with animation
* Refactor download management with shared isolate pool and optimize concurrent downloads
